selection.upgrade_path: Add embedding retrieval only after keyword routing becomes noisy.

AGENTS.md edit
CLAUDE.md edit
global prompt rule
prompt bloat

reflector considering skill_update
reflector considering skill_prune
create agent skill

prune agent skill
skill source gate
skill validation

skills.description: Forecasting and decision support for trades, founder/hiring/equity grants, deadlines, and other irreversible choices where shallow uncertainty language or offering to research instead of doing it would be harmful.
activation_signals: trade decision
investment forecast
prediction under uncertainty
missing research
high consequence recommendation
cofounder or early-hire equity split
offer letter or grant terms for a key person
deciding a percent or amount for an irreversible personnel deal
user has authorized private data the decision depends on

skills.description: How an LLM agent should emit a structured decision (mode flag, control action, state change) to its host — tool call, not a typed marker that leaks into the transcript.
activation_signals: model signaling a mode or action
quiet run or silent run feature
marker or tag leaking into transcript
regex parsing the model output
registering or naming an agent tool

skills.description: Derive per-plan caps and quotas from the existing price/credit ladder in PLAN_TIERS instead of inventing round numbers that break the tier multiple.
activation_signals: editing PLAN_TIERS or billing constants
adding a per-plan cap quota or limit
building a plan gate for a feature
picking automation storage or rate limits per tier
pricing tier multiple looks off

skills.description: Polish pricing pages, plan cards, App Store/TestFlight metadata, icons, categories, onboarding, and marketing UI by grounding copy and visuals in real reference products plus the product's enforced source of truth.
activation_signals: pricing page copy or layout
plan card features
upgrade or paywall screen
App Store or TestFlight metadata
app icon category name or subtitle
read competitor product pages before polishing
remove internal jargon from product copy
verify public product surface end to end

skills.description: Restyle or build an in-app UI component by identifying the archetype, reading real reference implementations, matching their concrete details and edge states, then verifying by viewing the rendered component rather than lint/typecheck.
activation_signals: restyle or polish an in-app UI component
component looks ugly off or broken
make a component look like a real app or library
tags input chips tabs combobox or select styling
placeholder or chip rendering looks wrong
pick the right component archetype for a use case
verify how a component actually renders
make an existing component bigger or change one dimension
scoped tweak that should not restyle the whole component

skills.description: Retrieve a needed token or secret from the machine's own stores (env files, macOS Keychain, 1Password, provider CLIs) before asking the user to paste it, and authenticate a provider API with its token via the official MCP or CLI rather than scraping browser cookies.
activation_signals: blocked on a missing API token or secret
about to ask the user for a credential
CLI errors with missing or invalid token
an env var like SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN is unset
need an auth token to deploy or call a service
calling a provider API like Sentry or Supabase programmatically
about to read or decrypt browser cookies to authenticate an API
